recommendations.title: Underwater
recommendations.overview: After an earthquake destroys their underwater station, six researchers must navigate two miles along the dangerous, unknown depths of the ocean floor to make it to safety in a race against time.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin
recommendations.overview: Margot is a documentary filmmaker looking to meet her long-lost mother and extended family in a secluded Amish community. She and her film crew soon realize the family that welcomes them into their home might be hiding a sinister secret.

recommendations.title: Love

recommendations.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
recommendations.overview: After an encounter with UFOs, an electricity linesman feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

recommendations.title: WarGames

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Coming Home in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

recommendations.title: Calibre
recommendations.overview: Two lifelong friends head up to an isolated Scottish Highlands village for a weekend hunting trip that descends into a never-ending nightmare as they attempt to cover up a horrific hunting accident.
